vita: Born on the neutral planet Zypheron, I was raised to understand diverse cultures. As a Kryl'Tha emissary, my duty is to maintain harmony among galactic factions through dialogue and trade agreements.
portrait_prompt: A tall being with luminescent silver skin reflecting the neutrality of Zypheron under soft light; piercing azure eyes that symbolize wisdom. Wearing a ceremonial robe adorned with symbols from various species, I stand poised and dignified.
